posts.text: Emmanuel Macron has been trying to move France away from an Africa policy weighed down by post-colonial baggage. New anglophone alliances seem to be paying off. posts.text:
Turns out, we didn't sell them any soybeans, and didn't get a BYD plant in Alabama😢. 

In fact, Trump and Xi had so little to discuss, that they toured a former imperial garden to kill time and pretend like they had something in common...
